message:
fix(runtime/codegen): Fix assertIsInstance for PyException and assert error handling

Phase 35: Fix assertIsInstance for ?*PyException types
- Add special handling in assertions_type.zig for ?*PyException, *PyException, and PyException
- Check the exception's type_name field instead of Zig @typeName

Phase 36: Fix assert statement to use catchable errors
- Change assert to use return error.AssertionError instead of std.debug.panic
- Convert non-string messages (tuples) to Python repr format
- Set exception info with runtime.exceptions.setException before returning

Additional fixes:
- Module function disambiguation when method shadows module-level function
- For loop improvements

Core tests: 4/4 passing (longexp, int_literal, unary, binop)
